NAME: Hermes Agent
FULL NAME: Hermes Agent — Self-Improving Open-Source AI Agent by Nous Research
DESCRIPTION: Hermes Agent is an open-source autonomous AI agent built by Nous Research with a built-in closed learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, persists knowledge, searches past conversations, and builds a user model across sessions. Supports 14 messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, etc.) and 6 execution backends (local, Docker, SSH, Modal, Singularity). Features include persistent memory (FTS5 + Honcho), automated skill creation, cron scheduling, parallel sub-agent delegation, full browser automation, MCP integration, and model-agnostic provider switching via CLI. MIT licensed, first released February 2026.
